dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Recommended dose: 666 mg (two 333 mg tablets) taken three times daily ( 2 ). Dose reduction to one 333 mg tablet taken three times daily for patients with moderate renal impairment (creatinine clearance 30 to 50 mL/min) ( 2.1 ). Acamprosate calcium delayed-release tablets are contraindicated in patients with severe renal impairment (creatinine clearance of ≤30 mL/min) ( 2.1 , 4.2 , 5.1 , 8.6 , 12.3 ).
